exam_name: CSET Social Science Subtest I (World History, U.S. History)
exam_rules: Review the list of materials that are prohibited at the test center for computer-based testing. For online proctoring, review the list of reasons your exam could be stopped and/or revoked.

prerequisites.description: Required for California Single Subject Social Science teaching credential

retake_policy.notes: No specific retake policy information provided.

objectives.title: Understanding of major historical events and developments
sub_objectives: Analyzing the causes and effects of major historical events
Evaluating the impact of historical developments on societies

objectives.title: Knowledge of significant historical figures and movements
sub_objectives: Identifying key historical figures and their contributions
Analyzing the influence of historical movements on global history

objectives.title: Understanding of major events and developments in U.S. history
sub_objectives: Analyzing the causes and effects of major events in U.S. history
Evaluating the impact of historical developments on American society

objectives.title: Knowledge of significant historical figures and movements in U.S. history
sub_objectives: Identifying key historical figures and their contributions
Analyzing the influence of historical movements on U.S. history

official_study_resources.title: CSET Social Science Study Guide
official_study_resources.notes: Official study guide and practice materials for CSET Social Science.

official_study_resources.title: CSET Social Science Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice tests for CSET Social Science.

aliases: cset social science subtest i world history u s history
